title: alnus trabeculosa var. nagurae
intro: Alnus trabeculosa var. nagurae, also known as the Japanese alder, is a variety of the alder tree native to Japan. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities, making it effective in treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Alnus trabeculosa var. nagurae include reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs. Herbal preparations of the plant, including infusions and decoctions, are traditionally used in Japanese medicine to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
